entries.source: "Build a photosynthesis explanation with me"
entries.value: "Gina a photosynthesis explanation tare da me"

entries.source: "Help me plan an essay"
entries.value: "Taimako me tsara an kasida"

entries.source: "Let's learn fractions together"
entries.value: "Let's koyi fractions together"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Collaborative Instruction on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Wani jagora mai amfani don ta amfani da Collaborative Instruction a kan inspir don foundations learning, tare da saƙonni, madaukai na karatu, da mafi aminci AI dabi’u.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Wani stronger madaukin karatu

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal.
entries.value: Adapt the zama don naka goal.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Malamin AI

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Nemi a small farko mataki rather fiye da a final amsa.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Tambayi the AI don bincika naka tunani, ba kawai the result.

entries.source: Build, critique, and learn in a shared workroom.
entries.value: Gina, critique, da koyi a cikin a shared workroom.

entries.source: Collaborative Instruction
entries.value: Koyarwa ta Haɗin Gwiwa

entries.source: Collaborative Instruction AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Koyarwar Hadin Gwiwa yanayin koyo ne na AI mai mayar da hankali; ana amfani da AI don koyo maimakon tara amsoshi kawai. An gina yanayin a kan aiki takamaimai: Bude a shared workspace tare da an AI collaborator. sa a rough artifact, trade edits, ƙalubalanci weak spots, log decisions, da leave tare da concrete ci gaba.

entries.source: Collaborative Instruction AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Collaborative Instruction Yanayin Koyo na AI: jagora mai amfani

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Kammala ta rubutu the ra’ayi back daga ƙwaƙwalwa.

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: Tushe

entries.source: Learners exploring foundations topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Masu koyo da ke binciken batutuwan tushe waɗanda ke son jagorar aiki maimakon akwatin amsa na gaba ɗaya.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Saƙonni don gwada

entries.source: Start the live mode at Collaborative Instruction. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Interactive Instruction. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Fara the yanayi kai tsaye at Collaborative Instruction. If kai want a neighboring learning format, gwada Interactive Instruction. don a broader duba na the dandali, karanta abin da an AI abokin koyo ya kamata do ga kowa.

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Fara tare da example saƙonni.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell the mode abin da kai suna trying don koyi ko produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Wannan difference shows up a cikin the flow. maimakon one giant response, the mafi kyau sessions move ta hanyar a madauki: saita a goal, gwada something, get martani, gyara the wurin rauni, da zaɓi the na gaba action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Wannan mayar da hankali yana da muhimmanci. Wani general chatbot can amsa almost anything, amma a yanayin koyo gives the conversation a siffa. It nudges kai toward the kind na thinking, atisaye, martani, ko exploration that helps the ra’ayi stick.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Wannan shi ne the same dabi’a behind studying tare da AI ba tare da cheating yourself: keep the mai koyo mai aiki. AI shi ne most mai amfani lokacin da it gives kai martani a kan naka thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Wannan mode shi ne especially mai amfani don masu koyo who want don:

entries.source: This mode is tuned for collaborative instruction with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Wannan yanayin an tsara shi ne don koyarwar haɗin gwiwa tare da nasa saƙonnin, misalai, da tsarin koyo.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Gwada the mataki a cikin naka own words.

entries.source: Use Collaborative Instruction when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Amfani da Collaborative Instruction lokacin da kai want a zama that starts quickly amma still adapts don kai. farko goal ba don sauti impressive. farko goal shi ne don sa the na gaba mataki feel possible.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Abin da this mode helps tare da

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Inda don go na gaba

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Kai can also fara tare da a rough version na naka real problem. Wani messy farko saƙo shi ne fine. zama can clarify the mataki, masu amfani, wa’adi, da salo once kai begin.
